prompt: Click the region where you would see what the headset user is currently seeing.
Click the region where you would see the selected activity description.
Click the region where you would see the headset user's progress through the activities.
Click the region where you would see all the virtual objects for the selected activity.
Click the region where you would see which controller button(s) should be pressed for the selected activity.
Click where you would find the list of activities.
Click where you would find a previously completed activity.
Click where you would find an upcoming activity.
Click where you would choose whether to show the left or right controller.
Click where you would watch the physical movement and controller button(s) for the selected activity.
Click where you would watch how the selected activity is performed in the virtual environment.
Click what you would use to draw on the headset user's view.
Click what you would use to remove all drawings from the headset user's view.
Click what you would use to point the headset user toward the selected virtual object.
Click what you would use to remove the directional arrow from the headset user's view.
Click what you would use to send the physical movement and controller guidance to the headset user.
Click what you would use to remove the physical movement and controller guidance from the headset user's view.
